title: High Efficiency Transformation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8r8mu","text":"Protocol for high efficiency heat shock transformation of competent E. coli cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":68,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"83gq5","text":"Source: New England Biolabs","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"1aohj","text":"SOC Outgrowth Medium - 100 ml (New England Biolabs Catalog #B9020S)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f890e","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"91tcv","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"65k80","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Thaw a tube of competent E. coli cells on ice for 00:10:00 . Mix gently and carefully pipette 50 µL of cells into a transformation tube on ice.
Add 1 µL containing 100 ng of plasmid DNA to the cell mixture. Carefully flick the tube 4-5 times to mix cells and DNA. Do not vortex.
Place the mixture on ice for 00:30:00 . Do not mix.
Heat shock at exactly 42 °C for exactly 00:00:30 . Do not mix.
Place on ice for 00:05:00 . Do not mix.
Pipette 950 µL of room temperature SOC into the mixture.
Place at 37 °C for 01:00:00 . Shake vigorously ( 250 rpm, °C, ) or rotate.
Mix the cells thoroughly by flicking the tube and inverting, then perform several 10-fold serial dilutions in SOC.
Spread 50-100 µl of each dilution onto a selection plate and incubate overnight at 37 °C . Alternatively, incubate at 30 °C for 24:00:00 or 25 °C for 48 hours.
creator: yuhanl
